projectDescription: InQL is a powerful Burp Suite extension for advanced GraphQL security testing, featuring automated schema scanning, vulnerability detection, batch query attacks, engine fingerprinting, and schema bruteforcing.
keyFeatures: Automatic GraphQL schema introspection and query generation
Points of Interest (POI) vulnerability scanning across 7+ categories
Circular reference detection for potentially vulnerable queries
Batch query attack support for rate limit circumvention
Schema bruteforcing when introspection is disabled (Clairvoyance-based)
Custom headers per domain with auto-population from Burp proxy history
Native Burp Suite message editor integration with GraphQL tab
Project-level state persistence across Burp sessions
publicApiSurface: Scanner - GraphQL endpoint and schema file analysis
Attacker (Batch Queries) - Batch GraphQL attack execution
POIScanner - Points of Interest vulnerability scanner
GQLSchema - GraphQL schema parsing and representation
Config - Project and global settings management
